note_a.quote: # 2026-04-28 ## Today - Atlas Atlas Atlas. Whole day on Atlas. The launch-sequencing thing is now resolved per Wed — docs first, product second. Reversing felt expensive at first; turns out it's just honest. - Atlas: drafted the first three docs. Already exposed two API design mistakes.

note_b.quote: The right order is: docs → product → external launch.
